title: Currency Economy Mod
body:
Step into a world where wealth is more than just a number – it’s a symbol of progress and power! In The Coinage of Ages, you’ll find yourself collecting and crafting three distinct types of coins: Bronze, Silver, and the rare and valuable Platinum. Each coin represents a stage of advancement in the game, offering new opportunities for crafting, trading, and unlocking new features.

Bronze Coins: The currency of the common folk, easily obtained and ideal for early game trades and crafting.
Silver Coins: A step above, Silver coins allow for greater trade options and are often used in mid-game recipes, opening doors to more advanced tools and equipment.
Platinum Coins: The pinnacle of wealth. Platinum coins are rare and highly prized, used to craft powerful items, trade with elite NPCs, or unlock the most valuable in-game content.
As you progress, collect these coins from mobs, chests, or even forge them from raw ores. Use them wisely – your coinage could make or break your journey.

Will you be a humble merchant or a legendary mogul? The choice is yours with The Coinage of Ages!
